header: Gerente de Excelência Comercial — Sanofi Medley

lesson.menu_desc: Why We Are the Best: Superlatives -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 14 -- The Best Choice -- Superlatives
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gleice Leonardo Rocha de Souza | Aula 14 -- The Best Choice

listenings.text: Hi, this is David from Sanofi Medley. Next month, we are going to present our top product to a big customer. I want you to explain why it is the best choice on the market. Please tell them three things. First, it is the fastest device we have. Second, it is the most reliable one for a busy pharmacy. And third, it has the best price for the quality. Remember, the customer wants the best solution, not only a cheap one. Send me your three reasons by email before Monday. Thank you.

Hello, my name is Renata. Today I am going to tell you why our company is the market leader. We are the most popular brand for pharmacies in our region, and we have the most experienced team. Our main advantage is simple. We offer the best service and the most valuable solution for the customer. Many people say we are the safest choice and the easiest company to work with. If you want a strong partner, we are the best option on the market. That is why we are the number one choice.

extra_audio.text: First, Gleice says which product is the best choice. Then she gives the strongest reason, the most important advantage. After that, she compares it with the other options on the market. Next, she explains why it is the best solution for the customer. Finally, she recommends it and says it is the number one option.
